title: Telegram: long-turn live status (typing heartbeat)
current_state: Long Pi turns have no typing indicator between first message and reply, leaving users wondering if Pi is still working.
target_state: A _TypingHeartbeat context manager re-sends chat_action=typing every 4s while _process_text runs, so Telegram shows the typing indicator continuously.
solution: Added _TypingHeartbeat inner class to TelegramTools; wraps _process_text call in _dispatch_bubble.
